query:
UPDATE contacts
SET contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified',
    rejectionReason = 'back_office_corporate_no_pa_relevance',
    rejectedAt = NOW()
WHERE id IN (2070009, 2070004, 2070008, 2070006, 2070005)
  AND crmOrphan = 0;
